description: Resolved review stage workflow. Contains states, transitions, and artifact types contributed by @orqastudio/plugin-agile-review into the review-process slot of agile-methodology.

code_review.description: Code review — verify implementation quality, standards compliance, and correctness.

gate_check.description: Gate check — run automated pre-checks and gather review context.

acceptance_verification.description: Acceptance verification — validate deliverables against acceptance criteria.

review_complete.description: Review process complete — verdict rendered, ready to proceed.

transitions.description: Start the review process with code review.
Code review passed, run gate checks.
Code review failed — return to implementation for fixes.

params.message: Code review failed — returning to implementation

transitions.description: Gate checks passed, proceed to acceptance verification.
Gate checks failed — return to implementation.

params.message: Gate check failed — returning to implementation

transitions.description: Acceptance criteria met — review is complete.
Acceptance criteria not met — return to implementation.

params.message: Acceptance verification failed — returning to implementation

transitions.description: Review passed, proceed to learning phase.
Review found fundamental issues requiring re-planning.

params.message: Major rework required — returning to planning

transitions.description: Gate check revealed code issues — return to code review.
Acceptance verification revealed issues — restart review from code review.
